summary: Restyled AskUserQuestion with horizontal tabs and exact requested keybindings, while preserving per-choice/whole-question notes and headless fallback. Added pure exported focus-cycle logic and tests.

raw:
## Completed
Applied the founder’s layout/keybinding changes to `AskUserQuestion`:
- Horizontal tab row at top with active tab highlighted.
- Left/Right switch tabs without requiring answers.
- Up/Down move option highlight.
- Space selects/toggles.
- Tab cycles: per-choice note → whole-question note → options.
- Enter submits all questions.
- Escape from note fields returns to options while preserving input.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/AskUserQuestion/index.ts` - restyled dialog layout and updated exact key handling.
- `extensions/AskUserQuestion/logic.ts` - added pure exported focus-cycle logic.
- `extensions/AskUserQuestion/test/logic_test.sh` - added focus/navigation assertions.

## How To Verify
`bash extensions/AskUserQuestion/test/logic_test.sh`

## Notes
UI primitives cited/used: `ctx.ui.custom`, plus `Container`, `Text`, and `Input` from `@earendil-works/pi-tui`.
